channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - MMA venues
channel.description: Latest mma venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
item.description: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.
